title: Claude Code - Usage & Session Insights
description: Event-level session analysis -- cross-event session drill-down, prompt patterns, event distribution, hourly activity. For aggregate token counts and user totals, see Real-Time Metrics.

links.title: Overview
links.tooltip: Executive summary with Prometheus + Athena highlights

links.title: Real-Time Metrics (Prometheus)
links.tooltip: Live token counts, session rates, user activity -- switch here for aggregate views

list.name: team
list.label: Team
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT team_id FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE team_id IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY team_id

list.name: user
list.label: User
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(user_name, user_id) AS user_display FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY user_display

list.name: model
list.label: Model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND model IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') ORDER BY model

panels.title: Event Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of event types across all Claude Code telemetry.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT REPLACE(event_name, 'claude_code.', '') AS event_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY event_name ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Hourly Activity Pattern
panels.description: Activity broken down by hour of day (UTC). Shows events, unique sessions, and unique users.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT LPAD(CAST(hour("timestamp") AS VARCHAR), 2, '0') || ':00' AS hour_utc, COUNT(*) AS events, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY hour("timestamp") ORDER BY hour("timestamp")

panels.title: Prompt Length Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of user prompt lengths by character count bucket.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT CASE WHEN prompt_length < 50 THEN '0-49' WHEN prompt_length < 100 THEN '50-99' WHEN prompt_length < 200 THEN '100-199' WHEN prompt_length < 500 THEN '200-499' WHEN prompt_length < 1000 THEN '500-999' ELSE '1000+' END AS length_bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.user_prompt' AND prompt_length IS NOT NULL AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(prompt_length)

panels.title: Daily Active Users & Sessions
panels.description: Daily unique users and sessions trend. Key adoption metric for tracking platform growth.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('day', "timestamp") AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS daily_users, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS daily_sessions FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Session Flow Pattern
panels.description: Hourly event flow showing prompts, API calls, tool uses, and errors. Errors shown as bars on right axis.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS time, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.user_prompt' THEN 1 END) AS prompts, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN 1 END) AS api_calls, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' THEN 1 END) AS tool_uses, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_error' THEN 1 END) AS api_errors FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time
panels.description: Stacked area chart showing input, output, cache_read, and cache_creation tokens over time by token type.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "timestamp") AS time, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(COALESCE(cache_read_tokens, 0)) AS cache_read_tokens, SUM(COALESCE(cache_creation_tokens, 0)) AS cache_creation_tokens FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio
panels.description: Percentage of input tokens served from cache. Higher values mean better cache utilization and lower costs.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(cache_read_tokens, 0)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + COALESCE(cache_read_tokens, 0)), 0), 1) AS cache_hit_pct FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' AND "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') AND (model LIKE '${model}' OR '${model}' = '%')

panels.title: Prompt Complexity vs Cost
panels.description: How prompt length correlates with session cost and complexity.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT CASE WHEN prompt_length < 50 THEN '0-49' WHEN prompt_length < 100 THEN '50-99' WHEN prompt_length < 200 THEN '100-199' WHEN prompt_length < 500 THEN '200-499' WHEN prompt_length < 1000 THEN '500-999' ELSE '1000+' END AS prompt_bucket, COUNT(*) AS prompt_count, ROUND(AVG(session_cost), 4) AS avg_session_cost, ROUND(AVG(session_api_calls), 1) AS avg_api_calls_per_session, ROUND(AVG(session_tools), 1) AS avg_tools_per_session FROM (SELECT p.session_id, p.prompt_length, SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN e.cost_usd ELSE 0 END) AS session_cost, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN 1 END) AS session_api_calls, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' THEN 1 END) AS session_tools FROM claude_code_telemetry.events p JOIN claude_code_telemetry.events e ON p.session_id = e.session_id WHERE p.event_name = 'claude_code.user_prompt' AND p.prompt_length IS NOT NULL AND p."timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND e."timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (p.team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(p.user_name, p.user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY p.session_id, p.prompt_length) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(prompt_length)

panels.title: Session Complexity Overview
panels.description: Top 20 sessions ranked by cost. Shows cross-event complexity metrics per session.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT COALESCE(user_name, user_id) AS user_display, session_id, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.user_prompt' THEN 1 END) AS prompts, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN 1 END) AS api_calls, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' THEN 1 END) AS tool_uses, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 4) AS cost_usd, date_diff('second', MIN("timestamp"), MAX("timestamp")) AS duration_sec FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY COALESCE(user_name, user_id), session_id ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Session Activity Summary
panels.description: Recent 50 sessions with full activity breakdown including tokens and prompt length.

targets.rawSQL: SELECT session_id, COALESCE(MAX(user_name), MAX(user_id)) AS user_display, MIN("timestamp") AS start_time, date_diff('second', MIN("timestamp"), MAX("timestamp")) AS duration_sec, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.user_prompt' THEN 1 END) AS prompts, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN 1 END) AS api_calls, COUNT(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.tool_result' THEN 1 END) AS tool_uses, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN cost_usd ELSE 0 END), 4) AS cost_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.api_request' THEN input_tokens + output_tokens ELSE 0 END) AS total_io_tokens, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN event_name = 'claude_code.user_prompt' THEN prompt_length END), 0) AS avg_prompt_length FROM claude_code_telemetry.events WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') AND (team_id LIKE '${team}' OR '${team}' = '%') AND (COALESCE(user_name, user_id) LIKE '${user}' OR '${user}' = '%') GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 50
